body:
I've found a workaround by modifying
[starship.lua#L40](https://github.com/starship/starship/blob/master/src/init/starship.lua#L40)
```):read("*a")```
to
```):read("*a"):gsub("\n$", "")```

It's hack but works in my case  😁 
```lua
local init = io.popen('starship init cmd'):read("*a")
init = init:gsub('%):read%("%*a"%)', '):read("*a"):gsub("\\n$", "")')
load(init)()
```

I am always hacked, but one thinking is always reminder.
Tum hacked ek raksha ko karne ke kosi mat kar . My peace chta hu wahi rehna
de .
Teri bas ke baat nhi hai mujhe harna, apne pichhe ek devil ko mat lga
